name: testdriver
description: AI-powered end-to-end testing with live preview and MCP integration

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with TestDriver.ai
walkthroughs.description: AI-powered end-to-end testing with live preview in your IDE.

steps.title: Get a TestDriver API Key
steps.description:
An API key is required to access TestDriver's AI model and cloud sandboxes.
[Get API Key](https://console.testdriver.ai/team)

steps.title: Set your TD_API_KEY
steps.description:
Add your API key as an environment variable:

```
export TD_API_KEY=your-key-here
```

Add this to your shell profile (~/.zshrc, ~/.bashrc) so it persists.

steps.title: Install the MCP Server
steps.description:
Install the TestDriver MCP server for AI-assisted test creation.
[Install MCP Server](command:testdriverai.installMcp)

steps.title: Run a test with Live Preview
Read the docs
steps.description:
Learn more about TestDriver's features, CI/CD integration, and advanced usage.
[Open Documentation](https://docs.testdriver.ai)

testdriverai.autoOpenPreview.description: Automatically open the live preview panel when a test starts

testdriverai.mcpServerPath.description: Custom path to TestDriver MCP server (leave empty for default)

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
